title: gymnogramma ampla
intro: Gymnogramma ampla, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is commonly known as the broad-leaved gymnogramma. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gymnogramma ampla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Gymnogramma ampla is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
